title: Lead Investment Banker at L&T Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at L&T Finance
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!
